results.evidence: test/cross/async-stream-consistency.test.ts: 20 tests pass — validates auth enforcement is consistent across async and realtime surfaces. Invalid auth fails both relay APIs (401 on /messages, /inbox) and SSE endpoint (401 on /events); valid auth succeeds both. curl validation against running relay confirmed 401 for /events and /messages with missing/invalid auth headers.

test/cross/async-stream-consistency.test.ts: validates retry/idempotency converges consistently across relay and stream. Tests 'multiple deduped sends + ack retries produce clean convergent state' confirms retries/replays converge to one logical outcome and both stream and inbox agree on final state.

test/cross/async-stream-consistency.test.ts: validates stream reconnect and inbox pull converge after interruption. After SSE disconnection, resumed stream with Last-Event-ID and inbox query converge to same complete state with no missing events.
